About Me

Where creativity meets purpose

Every stitch tells a story. Every silhouette carries a soul.

Indian roots, British refinement, global vision.

I am Joshiba Kurian, a passionate fashion designer from India currently based in the United Kingdom. With over four years of professional experience, I specialize in creating elegant, contemporary, and timeless fashion pieces that blend creativity with functionality.

My design philosophy focuses on craftsmanship, sustainability, innovation, and attention to detail. Every collection tells a story inspired by culture, confidence, and individuality.

Journey

Experience timeline

2021 – Present

Fashion Designer

Designing premium fashion collections for international and private clients. Managing the complete design process from concept sketches to production. Working with luxury fabrics and sustainable materials. Creating custom garments and fashion illustrations. Collaborating with clients for personalized styling.

2020 – 2021

Fashion Design Graduate & Freelance Designer

Completed formal training in fashion design and began freelance commissions — building a foundation in pattern making, garment construction, and textile selection.

2019

Fashion Illustration & Trend Research

Focused on developing an editorial voice through illustration, mood boards, and trend forecasting for personal collections.

Design Process

From vision to vogue

01

Research

Trend, culture & mood exploration.

02

Sketch

Illustrated concepts & silhouettes.

03

Fabric

Luxury & sustainable selection.

04

Pattern

Precise pattern making & drafting.

05

Prototype

Toile, fittings, refinement.

06

Production

Final couture-quality garment.
